name: OWASP Amass
description: In-depth Attack Surface Mapping and Asset Discovery

metadata.ai_description: Amass is the gold standard for subdomain enumeration and attack surface mapping. Use it when targeting domains to discover subdomains, related infrastructure, and IP addresses. It combines passive techniques (certificate transparency, DNS, web archives) with active techniques (DNS brute-forcing, zone transfers). Essential for expanding scope during reconnaissance.
use_cases: Discovering all subdomains of a target domain
Mapping the attack surface before deeper scanning
Finding related IP addresses and infrastructure
Identifying acquisition targets or related companies
limitations: Only works on domains, not IPs
Passive mode may miss some subdomains
